headline: Workday (WDAY) Why Embark’s Commit Deal Could Matter For Its Ecosystem
summary: Embark has acquired Commit, a consulting firm focused on the Workday ecosystem. The deal expands Embark’s human capital advisory capabilities for Workday deployments and modernization projects. The transaction increases the pool of third party expertise available to companies using Workday for HR and finance. Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) sits at the center of many HR and finance transformation projects, and this acquisition highlights the level of interest external consultants have in the...
